signature.description: Base64url-encoded ECDSA P-256 signature (ASN.1 DER) over SHA-256(challenge)

request_id.description: Correlation identifier included in responses for request tracing.

interest_rate_bps.description: The current loan summary calculation treats this value as a percentage, so `24` means `24%`.

session_token.description: Present when status is new_device_detected; use this with OTP at /auth/verify-new-device.
Session token returned from /auth/login when status is new_device_detected.

email.description: Optional email address. When supplied, pair it with `email_verification_id`.

email_verification_id.description: Verification ID returned by `/auth/otp/verify` for the optional email step.

phone_number.description: Nigerian phone number. Accepted local or international forms are normalized server-side.

device_id.description: Device identifier used during login initialization.

signature.description: Signature over challenge bytes from the device private key.

info.description:
HTTP API for authentication, OTP verification, device trust, identity validation,
password reset, and loan product workflows.
info.title: Neat Mobile App Backend API

post.description: Sends a password reset OTP to the account phone number for a recognized device.

parameters.description: Registered device identifier for the account.
parameters.name: X-Device-ID

401.description: Account not found for phone number or device not recognized

500.description: Failed to create or send password reset OTP

post.description:
Authenticates a user by phone and password, then starts device verification flow.
For recognized trusted devices, returns `challenge_required`.
For new or untrusted devices, returns `new_device_detected`, sends a login OTP to the user's
phone number, and returns a `session_token` for `/auth/verify-new-device`.

parameters.description: Stable device installation identifier from the mobile app.
parameters.name: X-Device-ID

400.description: Invalid request body, invalid phone number, or missing/invalid device id

post.description: Revokes the current auth session and refresh token record.

400.description: Invalid request body or missing authorization header

post.description: Sends an OTP for login, signup, or password reset via SMS or email.

400.description: Invalid request body, purpose, channel, email, or phone number
Invalid request body, purpose, or channel

post.description: Validates a refresh token and device binding from request body, rotates the refresh token, and returns new access and refresh tokens.

400.description: Missing refresh token/device id or invalid request body

post.description: Creates a new account and binds the initial device in one transaction. The server captures the client IP from the request metadata and stores it with the created auth session.

400.description: Invalid request body or failed registration validation

post.description: Verifies a password reset OTP, marks it as used, and updates the user's password hash.

parameters.description: Registered device identifier for the account.
parameters.name: X-Device-ID

400.description: Invalid request body, missing reset code, or invalid password format

401.description: Invalid device id, reset code, or user context

post.description: Validates a BVN using Tendar only. Provider preference from CBA is ignored for this endpoint.

400.description: Missing or invalid request body, invalid BVN, or provider validation error

500.description: CBA lookup, provider, or internal error

post.description: Validates a NIN using the configured NIN provider and compares it with a previously verified BVN using `bvn_validation_id`.

400.description: Missing or invalid request body, invalid NIN, or provider validation error

post.description: Verifies a signed login challenge for a recognized trusted device and returns tokens.

400.description: Invalid request body or missing challenge fields

401.description: Invalid challenge or signature verification failed

post.description:
Completes login for a new/untrusted device using the `session_token` returned by `/auth/login`
and the OTP sent during `new_device_detected` flow.

200.description: New device verified and tokens issued

400.description: Invalid request body or missing required fields

401.description: Invalid/expired session token or invalid OTP

get.description: Returns the currently available loan products from storage.

post.description:
Creates a pending loan application for the authenticated user after validating
the selected product, business data, user verification state, and core-banking loan checks.

400.description: Invalid request body or malformed input fields

404.description: Current user or loan rule not found

409.description: Multiple core-banking customers matched the supplied BVN

422.description: User or application data failed business-rule validation

503.description: Core-banking integration is unavailable or not configured

post.description:
Development-only endpoint served by `cmd/devsigner` to help Postman flows.
It signs `SHA-256(challenge)` using the configured ECDSA P-256 private key for `device_id`.

400.description: Invalid request body or missing fields

404.description: Device key not found in signer configuration

tags.description: Protected loan product discovery and application endpoints
tags.name: Loan

tags.description: Development-only signer helper endpoints for Postman/device simulation
tags.name: Dev Signer
